label: plain_text
text:
If a locker is toggled an odd number oftimes, it will be open. Otherwise,
it
will be closed. The
number
times a locker
is toggled is the same
of t
as
the
number
of factors of the locker
number. For
example, for
locker
#6，
Person 1 opens it, Person 2
2 closes it, Person 3 opens it and Person
6 closes
